name: Rendement Locatif
description: Calculez le rendement locatif brut annuel d'un bien immobilier.
seo_description: Calculez le rendement locatif brut annuel d'un bien immobilier. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Outil gratuit avec formule et exemples.
example_label: Calculating gross rental yield for property worth $320,generating $18,annual rent.
result_context: The yield_pct of {yield_pct}% is the gross rental yield before expenses and vacancies.
mistakes: Using gross yield without accounting for expenses (taxes, maintenance, vacancies)
Not including purchase costs in Total investment calculetion
Comparing yields across markets without considering appreciation potential
